headline: Unpacking Q1 Earnings: Pool (NASDAQ:POOL) In The Context Of Other Consumer Discretionary - Specialized Consumer Services Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at consumer discretionary - specialized consumer services stocks, starting with Pool (NASDAQ:POOL).

headline: Clarus, American Outdoor Brands, Oxford Industries, Pool, and Scholastic Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after reports showed that wholesale inflation accelerated more sharply than anticipated in April.
